Package com.rays.common

Interface BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>

  • Type Parameters:
    T - the DTO type extending BaseDTO
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    AttachmentServiceInt, CollegeServiceInt, CourseServiceInt, FacultyServiceInt, MarksheetServiceInt, RoleServiceInt, StudentServiceInt, SubjectServiceInt, TimetableServiceInt, UserServiceInt
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AttachmentServiceImpl, BaseServiceImpl, CollegeServiceImpl, CourseServiceImpl, FacultyServiceImpl, MarksheetServiceImpl, RoleServiceImpl, StudentServiceImpl, SubjectServiceImpl, TimetableServiceImpl, UserServiceImpl
    public interface BaseServiceInt<T extends BaseDTO>
    Generic base service interface defining standard business logic operations for all service classes in the ORS application.

    All service interfaces should extend this interface, parameterized with the appropriate DTO type, to inherit common CRUD and search method contracts.

    Author:
    Krati Trivedi

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void delete​(long id, UserContext userContext)
      Deletes a record by its primary key.
      T findByPk​(long pk, UserContext userContext)
      Retrieves a single DTO record by its primary key.
      T findByUniqueKey​(java.lang.String attribute, java.lang.Object value, UserContext userContext)
      Retrieves a single DTO record matching a specific attribute-value pair.
      long save​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Saves a DTO record by either adding a new record or updating an existing one.
      java.util.List<T> search​(T dto, int pageNo, int pageSize, UserContext userContext)
      Searches for DTO records matching the given criteria with pagination support.
      java.util.List search​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Searches for all DTO records matching the given criteria without pagination.
      void update​(T dto, UserContext userContext)
      Updates an existing DTO record in the database.

    • Method Detail

      • update

        void update​(T dto,
            UserContext userContext)
        Updates an existing DTO record in the database.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO with updated values
        userContext - the current user's context used for audit fields

      • save

        long save​(T dto,
          UserContext userContext)
        Saves a DTO record by either adding a new record or updating an existing one.

        If the DTO has a valid ID, an update is performed; otherwise a new record is added.

        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO to be saved or updated
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        the primary key ID of the saved or updated record

      • delete

        void delete​(long id,
            UserContext userContext)
        Deletes a record by its primary key.
        Parameters:
        id - the primary key of the record to delete
        userContext - the current user's context

      • findByPk

        T findByPk​(long pk,
           UserContext userContext)
        Retrieves a single DTO record by its primary key.
        Parameters:
        pk - the primary key of the record to find
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        the matching DTO, or null if no record is found

      • findByUniqueKey

        T findByUniqueKey​(java.lang.String attribute,
                  java.lang.Object value,
                  UserContext userContext)
        Retrieves a single DTO record matching a specific attribute-value pair.
        Parameters:
        attribute - the entity attribute name to filter by
        value - the value to match against the given attribute
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        the matching DTO if found, otherwise null

      • search

        java.util.List<T> search​(T dto,
                         int pageNo,
                         int pageSize,
                         UserContext userContext)
        Searches for DTO records matching the given criteria with pagination support.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search/filter criteria
        pageNo - the zero-based page number to retrieve
        pageSize - the number of records per page
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        a list of matching DTO records for the specified page

      • search

        java.util.List search​(T dto,
                      UserContext userContext)
        Searches for all DTO records matching the given criteria without pagination.
        Parameters:
        dto - the DTO containing search/filter criteria
        userContext - the current user's context
        Returns:
        a list of all matching DTO records
